falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug would be invalidated because the August 2024 bottom held above 5100; a break to 4950 would represent a significantly deeper drawdown than the referenced pattern, proving this is not a comparable bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 suggests elevated but contained stress; sustained VIX above 35 would indicate systemic panic rather than a blowoff washout, invalidating the 'bottom' signal and implying further downside

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX is simultaneously below 5200
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a flight-to-safety recession panic rather than a growth-scare bottom, as the August 2024 bottom saw yields hold above 3.90% with equities stabilizing; the divergence would prove the current pattern match is false

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
